message.content:
I don't have the capability to directly access or verify the external IP address of the host you're referring to. However, you can check the external IPv4 address using one of these methods:

Web Services:

Visit a site like WhatIsMyIP
 or ipinfo.io
.

Command Line (on the host machine):

If you're on a Linux or macOS system, run:

curl ifconfig.me

For Windows, run:

nslookup myip.opendns.com resolver1.opendns.com

Let me know if you need further guidance!
